statement: Production readiness requires explicit OCC/backlog alerting and external log sink integration in addition to in-app telemetry.
rationale: Convex docs emphasize OCC contention behavior, action pitfalls, and finite dashboard log retention.
keyAssumptions: workload will periodically hit contention spikes
team needs post-incident forensics beyond short-lived dashboard logs
validationCriteria: alerts fire on scheduler lag and mutation conflict spikes
critiquePoints: extra operational setup adds implementation overhead
questions: What minimum alert set is needed before full matrix?
